ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the stock */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Full name of the company */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector to which the company belongs */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the stock information was updated */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Initial Public Offering date of the stock */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry to which the company belongs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price record */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock on that date */,
  "volume" REAL /* Volume of trades for that day */,
  "daily_returns" REAL /* Daily return calculated for the stock */,
  "monthly_moving_avg" REAL /* Monthly moving average of closing prices */,
  "quarterly_moving_avg" REAL /* Quarterly moving average of closing prices */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock on that date */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock on that date */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock on that date */,
  "adjusted_close_price" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the stock on that date */,
  "dividend_amount" REAL /* Dividend amount paid on that date */,
  "split_coefficient" REAL /* Split coefficient for the stock on that date */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the historical price data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lags" (
  "lag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lag record */,
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the corresponding price_id in historical_prices */,
  "lag_1" REAL /* First lagged closing price */,
  "lag_2" REAL /* Second lagged closing price */,
  "lag_3" REAL /* Third lagged closing price */,
  "lag_4" REAL /* Fourth lagged closing price */,
  "lag_5" REAL /* Fifth lagged closing price */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the lag record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lags_price_id FOREIGN KEY ("price_id") REFERENCES historical_prices ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lags_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, trader, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last date the user logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_strategies" (
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading strategy */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the strategy */,
  "strategy_name" TEXT /* Name of the trading strategy */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the strategy was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the trading strategy */,
  "algorithm_type" TEXT /* Type of algorithm used */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used in the trading strategy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("strategy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_strategies_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "strategy_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the strategy */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of performance measurement */,
  "returns" REAL /* Returns generated by the strategy on that date */,
  "risk_metric" REAL /* Risk metric associated with the strategy */,
  "benchmark_returns" REAL /* Returns of a benchmark index on that date */,
  "alpha" REAL /* Alpha of the strategy */,
  "beta" REAL /* Beta of the strategy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_strategy_performance_strategy_id FOREIGN KEY ("strategy_id") REFERENCES trading_strategies ("strategy_id")
)
